_provenance.stage: Stage 6 — Synthesis (retroactive rebuild from Codex Stage 3)
version_history: v3 (2026-05-17): Stage 3 (Codex) FAS=55 with 3 verified claims. CRITICAL CORRECTION: Section 4(5) does NOT contain the 5-year renewal clause — Section 4(11) does. Section 4(5) is the Superintendent-or-above police-detention authority. The entire issue's section-citation was wrong. Headline + context + Fact 1 rebuilt with correct citation. July 2022 renewal vote tally added (111-88, 21 absent). Suaram data range corrected (since 2012, 20-28%). 'Petitions' softened to 'public submissions' per Stage 3.

revision_log: CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — Section 4(5) → Section 4(11) for the 5-year renewal clause. Section 4(5) is the Superintendent-rank police-detention authority. This was the single most important fact correction in the rebuild.
ADDED (Stage 3): 2022 renewal vote tally: 111 in favour, 88 against, 21 absent (Stage 3 verified).
REPHRASED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'Renewal motions produce shorter debates' qualified to 'Available renewal records show shorter debates than the 2012 passage'.
REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'short debate, narrow attendance, no substantive review' softened to factual 'Parliament extends or lets lapse the authority every five years' framing.
REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'Debate time allocated by Speaker and government business managers' qualified to 'in practice'.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — Suaram data corrected to 'since 2012' and '20-28%' range (was '2018-2023' and '~28%').
REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'Civil-society petitions have been submitted' → 'public submissions' (Stage 3: 'petitions' too specific).
REPHRASED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — Bar/Suaram/LfL intervention claim qualified to 'documented'.
REPHRASED (Stage 3): Reframe softened to 'extends an investigative-detention authority'.
PRESERVED (Stage 3 VERIFIED): Civil society called for substantive reform; renewal mechanism not designed to revisit whether the law should exist; renewal procedure ≠ substantive review.
